channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-07-21 17:50 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.5 is really good at React. It's also very affordable and token efficient!
item.description: Grok 4.5 is really good at React. It's also very affordable and token efficient!

item.title: @elonmusk: Today we're announcing the completion of one of the largest engineering projects in the company's hi...
item.description: Today we're announcing the completion of one of the largest engineering projects in the company's history: We rebuilt the X Android app from scratch It's faster, smoother and more reliable. But most of all: it will enable us to build new features at lightning speed.

item.title: @elonmusk: Watch 4K streaming video while Cybercab takes you anywhere you want
item.description: Watch 4K streaming video while Cybercab takes you anywhere you want

item.title: @elonmusk: The scientific community on X is very much alive. Can you get 20M+ views on Jacobian anywhere?
item.description: The scientific community on X is very much alive. Can you get 20M+ views on Jacobian anywhere?

item.title: @elonmusk: One very useful tool in Agent mode is image cropping of Grok Imagine . I don't know why no one talks...
item.description: One very useful tool in Agent mode is image cropping of Grok Imagine . I don't know why no one talks about it, as it is a crucial element for creating smooth transitions. During a conversation, you need to frame each person and switch camera angles to add energy to your video. Being able to pick the frame you want and crop it saves a huge amount of time.

item.title: @elonmusk: A Cybercab with no steering wheel, a massive display, and high speed Starlink is going to be the bes...
item.description: A Cybercab with no steering wheel, a massive display, and high speed Starlink is going to be the best place to work or watch a movie as you take a ride across town

item.title: @elonmusk: instagram: just got married linkedin: thrilled to announce we have sold more b2b saas X: hello there...
item.description: instagram: just got married linkedin: thrilled to announce we have sold more b2b saas X: hello there the jacobian conjecture is false

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX’s massive corpus of world-class engineering data (excluding material blocked by ITAR) will be...
item.description: SpaceX’s massive corpus of world-class engineering data (excluding material blocked by ITAR) will be added during supplemental training of the 2T run. This will dramatically improve Grok’s engineering capabilities.

item.title: @elonmusk: I’m currently using Grok 4.5 99% of the time now for both planning and tasks. The fact that I don’t ...
item.description: I’m currently using Grok 4.5 99% of the time now for both planning and tasks. The fact that I don’t have to switch out to a cheaper model to do tasks means there is less context window model switching and faster speed. Feels incredible.

item.title: @elonmusk: X is where all the real voices matter. You could never do this on Instagram.
item.description: X is where all the real voices matter. You could never do this on Instagram.

item.title: @elonmusk: It’s been this way for years
item.description: It’s been this way for years

item.title: @elonmusk: 𝕏Money with friends is fun <3 Congrats to all those that got access today!
item.description: 𝕏Money with friends is fun <3 Congrats to all those that got access today!

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla's Robotaxi/ride-hailing service is now available in 7 areas: • Orlando: Unsupervised Model Y r...
item.description: Tesla's Robotaxi/ride-hailing service is now available in 7 areas: • Orlando: Unsupervised Model Y rides only (new) • Miami: Unsupervised Model Y rides only • Tampa: Unsupervised Model Y rides only (new) • Dallas: Unsupervised Model Y rides only • Houston: Unsupervised Model Y rides only • Austin: Mix of Unsupervised & safety monitor Model Y rides • Bay Area: Safety monitor Model Y rides only

item.title: @elonmusk: Someone tipped me off to a website where it compiles all the real ratings for movies on Rotten Tomat...
item.description: Someone tipped me off to a website where it compiles all the real ratings for movies on Rotten Tomatoes and compares it to the fake push ratings they try to portray as real ratings. Really eye opening. Will link the website in first reply but it's called PopcornGap.
